home.title: Welcome to Your Kigali Bestie
home.subtitle: Your trusted companion for services in Kigali
home.description: Find housing, translators, and other services tailored for your needs

whyChooseUsItems.localExpertiseDesc: Deep knowledge of Kigali and trusted services that are hard to find online.
whyChooseUsItems.timeSavingDesc: We handle bookings and searches, so you avoid the usual guesswork.
whyChooseUsItems.trustedSupportDesc: Professional support for whatever you need, from housing to event planning.

home.quickServicesDesc: Fast and efficient solutions for your everyday needs
home.providersDesc: Vetted professionals you need but can't easily find online. Starting at just $3.42
home.starterGuideDesc: Everything newcomers need to know about living and working in Kigali and Rwanda.

guide.simCardDesc: At KGL Airport: MTN and Airtel kiosks near baggage claim. City branches available throughout Kigali.
guide.mobileMoneyDesc: Get MoMo at any MTN/Airtel shop with your passport. Works with all local numbers.
guide.currencyExchangeDesc: Airport Forex available 24/7. City branches and licensed bureaus throughout Kigali.
guide.transportNote: Safe and tracked rides across Kigali
guide.needHousingDesc: Apartments, Airbnbs, Hotels — we help you book the perfect place with expert guidance.

home.featuredDesc: Explore our core offerings designed to make your life easier.
home.customDesc: We offer custom services tailored exactly to what you need. Nothing is too specific.
home.purposeDesc: We're here to make life in Kigali easier, one service at a time.
home.missionDesc: To ease the weight of modern life in Kigali with hands-on support, trusted local connections, and genuine care.
home.visionDesc: To redefine lifestyle services in Rwanda by creating a concierge culture rooted in ease, trust, and local knowledge.
home.readyDesc: Let our concierge handle your most challenging tasks

personalServices.title: Personal Assistance
personalServices.description: Your dedicated personal assistant for daily tasks, scheduling, and anything you need help with.

personalServices.title: Construction Supervision
personalServices.description: We oversee your construction projects ensuring quality, timelines, and proper execution.

personalServices.title: House Sitting
personalServices.description: Peace of mind while you travel - we care for your home, plants, and pets.

personalServices.title: Errand Running
personalServices.description: Grocery shopping, picking up dry cleaning, bill payments - we handle it all.

personalServices.title: Trip Planning
personalServices.description: End-to-end travel planning including flights, accommodation, and itineraries.

personalServices.title: Event Planning
personalServices.description: From birthdays to corporate events - we handle every detail.

personalServices.title: Airport Pickups
personalServices.description: Reliable and timely airport transfers with meet-and-greet service.

personalServices.title: Courier Deliveries
personalServices.description: Fast and secure document and package delivery across Kigali.

personalServices.title: House Chores
personalServices.description: Regular or one-time housekeeping services tailored to your needs.

personalServices.title: Moving Assistance
personalServices.description: Professional help with packing, loading, and settling into your new home.

hardToFind.title: Plumbers
hardToFind.description: Licensed and vetted plumbers for any emergency or installation.

hardToFind.title: Electricians
hardToFind.description: Certified electricians for repairs, installations, and inspections.

hardToFind.title: IT Support

services.title: Our Services
services.description: Choose from our range of services designed to help you settle in Kigali
services.pageDescription: Your Kigali Bestie is more than a service list, we are a local concierge and Rwanda starter guide built to help you find trusted support, book hard-to-find providers, and handle the details other platforms do not cover.
services.whatWeDoDescription: We help newcomers, busy professionals, and businesses across Rwanda by offering personalised assistance, trusted local connections, and custom support for requests that go beyond the usual service marketplace.
services.customConcierge: Custom concierge support for errands, event planning, house sitting, and move assistance.
services.starterGuideService: A Rwanda starter guide with airport support, mobile money help, transport apps and safe local recommendations.
services.hardToFind: Access to hard-to-find service providers and translator bookings in English and French.
services.needHelpDescription: If you have a custom request or need a trusted local provider for anything not listed here, choose the button below and we will help you directly through WhatsApp.
services.coreServicesDescription: These are the main service categories visitors can request most often, but our work is custom-tailored to your exact needs. If your request is unique, we will still help you find the right person or solution.
services.translatorDescription: We currently support English and French translator bookings. Choose a language, select your package, and pay an advance booking fee to secure your local interpreter.
services.appsDescription: Access trusted local apps and service tools from verified providers. These links help you connect directly with local solutions in Rwanda.
services.guideDescription: A quick guide for your first days in Rwanda, including how to get a SIM, use mobile money, stay connected, and find safe housing and transport.
services.guideSectionDescription: Practical Kigali onboarding tips grouped in one easy section.
services.personalizedHelpDescription: Talk to Your Kigali Bestie and get direct support today.

auth.signInDescription: Sign in to your account to manage requests, bookings, and your profile.
auth.requestNotice: You need to sign in (or create an account) to submit your request. We saved your filled form and will bring you back after login.
auth.createAccountDescription: Join our platform as a Starter or Service Provider. Start booking services or grow your business today.
auth.starterLongDescription: Request services, book providers, get things done
auth.serviceProviderLongDescription: List services, manage bookings, grow your business
auth.chooseType: Choose Starter or Service Provider to begin.
auth.name: Name
auth.redirecting: Redirecting you back to finish your request…

auth.addEachService: Add each service with its price

auth.mobileAppDescription: Show store options and their links.

auth.storeLinksRequired: Select Play Store or App Store for the mobile app.
auth.selectStarter: Select Starter to use this form.
